perturbation.original_text: Monthly v irtual interactions need to be planned by Mentor, to ensure a continuous acceleration of the Participants Ideas ´ towards business maturity. A mid -term review and survey will be required by April 2018, to evaluate progress made and ensure that the recommend ations of the coaching plan are currently implemented by Participants. In case of a non -positive matching or non-compliance to his/her assigned duties (having monthly interactions with the mentees, keeping contacts with the Copernicus Accelerator team , promptly informing the organizers about any relevant issue connected to the coaching relationship) , Mentor may be replaced by a more suitable candidate for the Participants´ needs.
perturbation.changed_text: Monthly v irtual interactions need to be planned by Mentor, to ensure a continuous acceleration of the Participants Ideas ´ towards business maturity. A mid -term review and survey will be required by April 2018, to evaluate progress made and ensure that the recommend ations of the training plan are currently implemented by Participants. In case of a non -positive matching or non-compliance to his/her assigned duties (having monthly interactions with the mentees, keeping contacts with the Copernicus Accelerator team , promptly informing the organizers about any relevant issue connected to the coaching relationship) , Mentor may be replaced by a more suitable candidate for the Participants´ needs.
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'coaching plan' to 'training plan' introduces ambiguity regarding the nature of the support being provided. Is it coaching or training? The contradiction lies in the document's overarching description of 'coaching' and the sudden shift to 'training plan' in this section. The meaning of this phrase creates a conflict with the type of mentorship provided.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Monthly v irtual interactions need to be planned by Mentor, to ensure a continuous acceleration of the Participants Ideas ´ towards business maturity. A mid -term review and survey will be required by April 2018, to evaluate progress made and ensure that the recommend ations of the training plan are currently implemented by Participants. In case of a non -positive matching or non-compliance to his/her assigned duties (having monthly interactions with the mentees, keeping contacts with the Copernicus Accelerator team , promptly informing the organizers about any relevant issue connected to the coaching relationship) , Mentor may be replaced by a more suitable candidate for the Participants´ needs.
perturbation.justification: The change from 'coaching plan' to 'training plan' creates a 'Misaligned Terminology' contradiction. The 'Perturbation Explanation' states that the document generally describes 'coaching,' and the sudden use of 'training plan' introduces ambiguity about the nature of support, conflicting with the document's overall theme. The 'Contradicted Text' is the same as the 'Changed Text', indicating that the change itself creates an internal inconsistency due to the 'Misaligned Terminology' definition.

perturbation.original_text: The coaching service provided by Mentor is worth a maximum fee of EUR 5,000 (VAT excluded) per Participant coached , that will be remunerated to Mentor at the end of the programme, after the submission and approval of the final summary report of the coaching relationships. Payment shall be made within 30 days from the receipt of invoice, and following the invoice verification by Organiser. No deductions w ill be made from the gross fees paid to mentor who shall be solely responsible for ensuring that all and any Government taxes and other deductions are paid by him/her.
perturbation.changed_text: The advisory service provided by Mentor is worth a maximum fee of EUR 5,000 (VAT excluded) per Participant coached , that will be remunerated to Mentor at the end of the programme, after the submission and approval of the final summary report of the coaching relationships. Payment shall be made within 30 days from the receipt of invoice, and following the invoice verification by Organiser. No deductions w ill be made from the gross fees paid to mentor who shall be solely responsible for ensuring that all and any Government taxes and other deductions are paid by him/her.
perturbation.explanation: Replacing "coaching service" with "advisory service" can create confusion. Does 'advisory service' encompass the same activities as 'coaching service', which is what is described everywhere else? This creates doubt about what's being paid for.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Payment The Organiser will reimburse Mentor the travel arrangements and accommodation for the Acceleration Bootcamp in Tallinn in 2017 (a maximum of EUR 800) and the closing bootcamp in 2018 (a maximum of EUR 700) . The advisory service provided by Mentor is worth a maximum fee of EUR 5,000 (VAT excluded) per Participant coached , that will be remunerated to Mentor at the end of the programme, after the submission and approval of the final summary report of the coaching relationships. Payment shall be made within 30 days from the receipt of invoice, and following the invoice verification by Organiser. No deductions w ill be made from the gross fees paid to mentor who shall be solely responsible for ensuring that all and any Government taxes and other deductions are paid by him/her.
perturbation.justification: The modification replaces 'coaching service' with 'advisory service'. While the original text consistently refers to 'coaching', the changed text introduces 'advisory service'. The explanation highlights that this raises uncertainty: Does 'advisory service' encompass the same activities as 'coaching service', which is described everywhere else? The contradicted text contains the same language as the changed text, highlighting the same area, creating an in-text contradiction by using 'advisory service' in one specific instance and 'coaching services' in the surrounding area of the document. This aligns with the definition of Misaligned Terminology, where the contract uses multiple terms interchangeably without defining them, leading to conflicting obligations.

perturbation.original_text: Confidential Information does not include: > information already known or independently developed by Mentor prior to the disclosure of any Idea; > information already in the public domain through no wrongful act of Mentor; or > information received from a third party who was free to disclose such information. In case of doubt any information is deemed to be Confidential Information unless Mentor proves that such information is not confidential.
perturbation.changed_text: Protected Information does not include: > information already known or independently developed by Mentor prior to the disclosure of any Idea; > information already in the public domain through no wrongful act of Mentor; or > information received from a third party who was free to disclose such information. In case of doubt any information is deemed to be Confidential Information unless Mentor proves that such information is not confidential.
perturbation.explanation: Replacing 'Confidential Information' with 'Protected Information' in the definition introduces conflict because throughout the text, all other references still pertain to "Confidential Information". This creates a direct contradiction about what information is actually covered by the NDA.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Non -Disclosure of Confidential Information / Obligations of Mentor Mentor shall not use any Co nfidential Information for any purpose except to review, assess and help develop the Participants´ Ideas. Mentor shall not disclose any Confidential Information to any third party or to Mentor ’s employees and/or employer without the prior written consent o f the Participants. Mentor shall require his/her 5 employees who will have access to Confidential Information to commit to a non -disclosure agreement that protects the Confidential Information to at least the same degree as this Agreement. Mentor shall take all reasonable measures to protect the secrecy of, and avoid any unauthorised disclosure or use of Confidential Information. Such measures shall include the highest degree of care that Mentor utilises to protect Mentor ’s own confidential information of a similar nature, but no less than reasonable care. Notwithstanding Mentor ’s right to assess and rate the Ideas of the Participants, Mentor shall not use the Confidential information for his/her own or third parties purposes and shall not file for any intel lectual property right protection for the Confidential Information or parts of it. Mentor shall notify Organiser immediately in writing of any misuse or misappropriation of any Confidential Information that may come to Mentor ’s attention. Mentor agrees to segregate all Confidential Information relating to this agreement from Confidential Information of others to avoid commingling.
perturbation.justification: The change replaces 'Confidential Information' with 'Protected Information' in the definition. However, the contradicted section still refers to 'Confidential Information', creating a direct conflict. The definition of what is confidential is altered, while the obligations remain tied to the original term, rendering the obligations unclear. This creates a strong in-text contradiction, leading to uncertainty about which information is actually covered by the agreement.

perturbation.original_text: This Agreement shall be effective as of 2 May 2017 and may not be terminated except for important cause. Notwithstanding the termination of this Agreement , any Confidential Information must be kept confidential for as long as such Confidential Information is not publicly known unless it becomes part of the public domain through no wrongful act of Mentor. This agreement may not be changed or modified, except by an agreement in writing , signed by both parties.
perturbation.changed_text: This Contract shall be effective as of 2 May 2017 and may not be terminated except for important cause. Notwithstanding the termination of this Agreement , any Confidential Information must be kept confidential for as long as such Confidential Information is not publicly known unless it becomes part of the public domain through no wrongful act of Mentor. This agreement may not be changed or modified, except by an agreement in writing , signed by both parties.
perturbation.explanation: Using 'Contract' instead of 'Agreement' in the initial sentence introduces a potential contradiction. It creates conflict within the first two sentences of the section. The meaning of this phrase creates a conflict with the rest of the text using "agreement".
perturbation.contradicted_text: Term This Contract shall be effective as of 2 May 2017 and may not be terminated except for important cause. Notwithstanding the termination of this Agreement , any Confidential Information must be kept confidential for as long as such Confidential Information is not publicly known unless it becomes part of the public domain through no wrongful act of Mentor. This agreement may not be changed or modified, except by an agreement in writing , signed by both parties.
perturbation.justification: The change from 'Agreement' to 'Contract' in the first sentence introduces a contradiction because the subsequent sentences and the contradicted text consistently use 'Agreement'. This creates ambiguity as to whether 'Contract' and 'Agreement' refer to the same document, leading to a potential conflict in interpretation and enforcement, satisfying the definition of 'Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction'.
